ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the city */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation in meters */,
  "population_total" INTEGER /* Total population of the city */,
  "area_total_sq_mi" REAL /* Total area of the city in square miles */,
  "area_land_sq_mi" REAL /* Total land area of the city in square miles */,
  "area_water_sq_mi" REAL /* Total water area of the city in square miles */,
  "area_water_percent" REAL /* Percentage of area that is water */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square mile) */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "income_per_capita" REAL /* Average income per capita */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Primary zip code for the city */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the city was established */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elevations" (
  "elevation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each elevation record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city associated with this elevation data */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation in meters */,
  "elevation_ft" REAL /* Elevation in feet */,
  "elevation_type" TEXT /* Type of elevation (e.g., average, highest point, lowest point) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the location where the elevation is measured */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("elevation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elevations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city associated with this population data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population record */,
  "population_total" INTEGER /* Total population of the city for that year */,
  "population_males" INTEGER /* Number of males in the population */,
  "population_females" INTEGER /* Number of females in the population */,
  "population_age_0_14" INTEGER /* Number of people aged 0-14 */,
  "population_age_15_64" INTEGER /* Number of people aged 15-64 */,
  "population_age_65_plus" INTEGER /* Number of people aged 65 and above */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_populations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city associated with this area data */,
  "area_total_sq_mi" REAL /* Total area of the city in square miles */,
  "area_land_sq_mi" REAL /* Land area of the city in square miles */,
  "area_water_sq_mi" REAL /* Water area of the city in square miles */,
  "area_water_percent" REAL /* Percentage of area that is water */,
  "area_green_space_sq_mi" REAL /* Total area of green spaces (parks, forests) in square miles */,
  "area_green_space_percent" REAL /* Percentage of area that is green space */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_areas_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., planner, admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
